summary: Verification run for iteration_8 dead-element fixes. ALL 5 critical/high/low fixes are confirmed working: Academy course cards → /academy/:slug detail with curriculum + Learn-with-Brain auto-ask, TradeNews featured + cards → /trade-news/:id detail with Ask Brain, Marketplace listings → wa.me links (new tab) and reels → #download with 'Watch in app', Suppliers cards → wa.me Connect, Network member cards → /contact Connect. Brain ?q= prefill auto-submits and renders an answer (5 messages thread). Regression sweep: nav dropdowns (Explore/Platform/Learn), footer, HSN finder, products listing+detail, /countries/uae, /search, services hub+detail, Brain FAB on content page — all pass. Zero console errors, zero 4xx/5xx network responses observed during the entire sweep.
critical_code_review_comments: All previously dead clickable cards now have either <Link> or <a> wrappers with real destinations — root cause of user's 'nothing is connected' complaint is fully resolved.
Marketplace listings open external WhatsApp in target=_blank (correct) and reels go to in-page #download anchor (acceptable for 'Watch in app' affordance).
Brain ?q= prefill via useSearchParams works end-to-end (verified for IEC question + Academy 'Teach me about: ...' + TradeNews 'Ask the Brain' deep-links).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — every previously-dead card now has a working destination; all regression flows still functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_8's 5 dead-card defects are all fixed and verified in iteration_9. Verified data-testids and destinations: academy-course-N → /academy/:slug (3 levels x 3 cards), academy-lesson-1..6, academy-detail-ask-brain → /brain?q=Teach%20me%20about:..., academy-related-{slug}. news-featured + news-card-0..4 → /trade-news/:id; news-detail-ask-brain → /brain?q=...; 'More headlines' rendered. mp-listing-0 is <A> with wa.me href + target=_blank + 'Enquire on WhatsApp'; mp-reel-0 is <A> with href=#download + 'Watch in app' badge; mp-rfq 'Reply on WhatsApp' wa.me href intact. suppliers-card-N contains a wa.me 'Connect with supplier' link; nw-member-N contains a /contact 'Connect' link. Brain widget FAB testid is brain-widget-fab (full); messages thread testids brain-widget-msg-N / CTAs brain-widget-ctas-N (trailing s). Brain main page input/send testids: brain-input/brain-send; messages brain-msg-N.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — verification iteration; iteration_8 documented the original RCA. Fixes verified live against https://trade-beyond-2.preview.emergentagent.com.
